feed.title: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Collection of mittwald skills for the Claude plugin system.

entry.title: react-native-perf-skills
entry.content: DMAIC performance workflow for React Native — Define, Measure, Analyze, Improve, Control. Layers on top of callstackincubator/react-native-best-practices with profiling interpretation, antipattern detection, and regression monitoring.

entry.title: event-planner
entry.content: Event Planner Emily, the event-planning persona: builds and segments the guest list, stands up multi-channel outreach campaigns, and tracks RSVPs and ticket sales. Skills: event-planner:campaign-tag, event-planner:campaign-builder, event-planner:sms-campaign, event-planner:instagram-dm-campaign.

entry.title: social-media-strategist
entry.content: Social Media Strategist Sofia: drafts and repurposes content in the operator's own voice, read off the instrumented social workspace, never a generic brand voice. Writes; does not publish. Skills: social-media-strategist:linkedin-draft, social-media-strategist:clip-repurpose.

entry.title: flow
entry.content: Developer workflow utilities to keep in the flow

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Personal skills for Kubernetes, infrastructure, and cloud engineering workflows

entry.title: honestweek
entry.content: Honest, git-verified, private-by-default weekly work summaries from your AI coding sessions.

entry.title: fatsecret-workflow
entry.content: FatSecret iOS team workflow: feature development lifecycle, story analysis, test planning, Figma-driven implementation, code review, and build tools

entry.title: chearmstrong-skills
entry.content: Portable personal coding-agent skills for code review, maintainability, architecture checks, cost estimation, supply-chain impact checks, commit messages, and review-comment workflows.

entry.title: surface
entry.content: Ad-hoc structured input from one or more recipients via flexible, distributable interfaces. Generates ephemeral UI surfaces with opaque-ID affordances, delivers URLs through any outbound channel, and autonomously drains submissions to react. Also covers runbook delivery: a list of shell commands the user works through one at a time, with per-step copy affordances and done buttons. Especially strong for information-dense pages where rich context (tables, grids, flagged data, narratives) appears alongside multiple granularities of structured input.

entry.title: executive-assistant
entry.content: Executive Assistant Eve, the personal and family chief of staff: keeps the maintainer's long-running family records honest and reconciled against his calendars and inbox. Skills: executive-assistant:family-timeline-refresh.

entry.title: safety-net
entry.content: Block destructive git and filesystem commands before execution

entry.title: indrasvat-skills
entry.content: 15 Claude Code skills: CI gating, exec plans, PR shipping, code cleanup, PR triage, K8s diffing, migration safety, API compat, rollout health, CRD impact analysis, PRD generation, iTerm2 automation, Cloudflare deployment, CodeRabbit reviews, and browsing-as-you (shared authenticated Chrome over CDP)

entry.title: cam-fleet-ops
entry.content: 15-skill fleet operations bundle for Claude Code — fleet CI/lint audit, Dependabot ops, Prisma migrations, ESLint flat-config upgrade, monorepo CI matrix, secret scanning, repo archival policy, lockfile regeneration, branch protection, and stack-version auditing. Built from a 59-repo fleet (15 Prisma migrations, 35 Dependabot configs, 14 lint configs rewritten) — every skill cites real bugs and real fixes.

entry.title: nervepack
entry.content: Personal AI context hub: skills (behavior), sources (curated technical refs), wiki (LLM-owned synthesis), and re-runnable Ubuntu setup. Karpathy-style LLM-wiki layer on top of a skill library.

entry.title: harness-architect
entry.content: Harness Architect Harry, who builds and maintains the Claude Code harness itself: the agent-loaded files, the guidance corpus behind them, and the hooks that protect them. Skills: harness-architect:agent-files-architect, harness-architect:close-out.

entry.title: claude-forge
entry.content: oh-my-zsh for Claude Code — 11 agents, 34 commands, 25 skills, 15 hooks + 9 examples (21 events), 9 rules, 4 MCP (minimal: playwright, context7, jina-reader, chrome-devtools@0.23.0). One-line install: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sangrokjung/claude-forge/main/install.sh | bash

entry.title: aicoach-framework
entry.content: Multi-agent AI coach for endurance & strength athletes — runs entirely inside Claude Code.

entry.title: claude-skills
entry.content: OSS Claude Code skills: deep-* analyses, autopilot, loop-until-done, monitor, retrospect, and 50+ more.

entry.title: vischeck
entry.content: Visual verification for Claude Code — screenshot CLI, smart reminder hook, and dev auth bypass pattern for any framework.

entry.title: remove-ai-code-slop
entry.content: Scan a branch's diff and remove AI-generated code slop

entry.title: prd-interviewer
entry.content: Iteratively interview the user to build a detailed PRD, one question at a time

entry.title: mergify
entry.content: Skills for the Mergify CLI: manage merge queues, stacked pull requests, Test Insights (flaky tests, quarantine), merge protections, and Mergify configuration directly from the terminal.

entry.title: mu
entry.content: Mu, the general-purpose super-AI and clone-of-Mujtaba persona. Home of the domain-neutral skills every persona and session reaches for. Skills: mu:sidequest, mu:pause, mu:second-opinion, mu:apprentice-mode, mu:karpathy-gist-check, mu:qr-code.

entry.title: qa-set-m1
entry.content: QA skillset member qa-set-m1 — used to test member-private exclusion.

entry.title: testtest
entry.content: testtesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttest

entry.title: ornn-agent-manual
entry.content: Operational manual for AI agents using the Ornn skill-lifecycle API. Loads as a skill so that, once installed, the host agent can search / pull / execute / build / upload / share skills via the NyxID CLI without further setup. Authoritative contract between Ornn and the agent. Pair this file with references/api-reference.md (the full per-endpoint catalogue and error legend) — both ship together as one Ornn skill.

entry.title: research-consensus-bundle
entry.content: Curated agent-manual set for consensus comparison across CLI + HTTP variants (demo).

entry.title: fitness-coach
entry.content: Fitness Coach Felix, the training persona: plans the maintainer's next workout from his Gym Google Sheet and pushes it to the Hevy app as a routine. Skills: fitness-coach:workout-plan-wip.

entry.title: financial-advisor
entry.content: Financial Advisor Farhan, the net-worth keeper: runs the maintainer's periodic net-worth update on a scoreboard spreadsheet and tracks credits and coupons. Operates the record; does not advise on investments. Skills: financial-advisor:scoreboard-refresh, financial-advisor:track-credits-and-coupons.

entry.title: ornn-agent-manual-cli
entry.content: Operational manual for AI agents using the Ornn skill-lifecycle API via the NyxID CLI (`nyxid proxy request ornn-api …`). Once loaded, the host agent can search / pull / execute / build / upload / share skills end-to-end without further setup. Authoritative contract between Ornn and the agent. Pair this file with references/api-reference.md (the full per-endpoint catalogue + error legend) — both ship together as one Ornn skill.

entry.title: ornn-agent-manual-http
entry.content: Operational manual for AI agents using the Ornn skill-lifecycle API via direct HTTPS with a NyxID bearer token (`curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" …`). Once loaded, the host agent can search / pull / execute / build / upload / share skills end-to-end. Authoritative contract between Ornn and the agent. Pair this file with references/api-reference.md (the full per-endpoint catalogue + error legend) — both ship together as one Ornn skill.

entry.title: harness-claude
entry.content: Harness for Claude Code — skills, /harness:* slash commands, persona subagents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP tools without per-repo `harness setup`. Sibling plugins exist for Cursor, Gemini CLI, and Codex.

entry.title: gander
entry.content: A live Hollywood-Squares dashboard of your Claude Code agents and sub-agents — each one an animated avatar that acts out what it's doing (thinking, coding, reading, spawning, testing, erroring), with a recursive hierarchy view and animated information flow between parent and child agents. Driven automatically by Claude Code hooks.

entry.title: agentforce-mobile-sdk
entry.content: Integrate the Agentforce Mobile SDK into an iOS app. Walks consumers through use-case discovery, picks the right auth flow (employee OAuth/JWT vs public service agent vs guest), adds the SPM or CocoaPods dependency, and scaffolds Swift files for the credential provider, AgentforceClient manager, OSLog-backed logger, UI delegate, and a SwiftUI chat host.

entry.title: phucbm-skills
entry.content: phucbm-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entry.title: lsp-refactor
entry.content: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entry.title: bharats-claude-toolkit
entry.content: Bharat's personal Claude Code setup, packaged as a plugin + marketplace: 116 vendored skills and 4 agents spanning engineering, AI, product, design, copy/UX, go-to-market, marketing, and enterprise & ops, plus a curated always-on plugin tier and an on-demand firehose one command away.

entry.title: langfuse
entry.content: Skills for working with Langfuse, the open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, and evaluation.

entry.title: acp-find
entry.content: The trust + intelligence layer for the Virtuals Protocol ACP marketplace — search, evaluate, and orchestrate on-chain agents, and know which are REAL. v0.18.0 tiers the tools: a lean 20-tool CORE (search + trust) is the default for the remote endpoint and bare npx, while the full 47-tool surface is opt-in via ACP_FIND_TIER=full (this plugin runs FULL). v0.17.0 adds a remote Streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint (add it by URL, no install) and makes the trust verdict authoritative across the plugin, the website report, and an embeddable by-address badge. v0.16.4 weights acp_agent_trust by DISTINCT organic buyers (N completions from one buyer no longer reads like N from many; the headline + delivery lane disclose organicDistinctBuyers and the score dampens single-buyer concentration). v0.16.3 documents the marketplace-gap↔categories reconciliation fields (totalAllMarketplaces/denominatorNote/countScope). v0.16.2 hardens acp_agent_trust so VERIFIED requires a genuine third-party buyer (excludes the operator's own portfolio wallets, so self-dogfooding can't earn VERIFIED). v0.16.0 adds acp_agent_trust (a one-call VERIFIED/OPERATIONAL/UNVERIFIED/SUSPECT/LIKELY_CLONE verdict fusing clone-screening, SecurityBot grade, and official-indexer completed-jobs-by-distinct-counterparties — the anti-self-loop signal), de-blinds acp_agent_verify onto the official Virtuals indexer, and adds opt-in inline trust on acp_find/acp_search_agents. Plus semantic V1+V2 search, REAL V2 transactions (acp_v2_transactions/acp_agent_jobs/acp_v2_demand), Degen Arena overlap, risk scoring (0-100, A-F), SecurityBot scanning, marketplace gap analysis, and one-call composites — backed by the public api.acp-metabot.dev gateway. Use it without leaving Claude Code.

entry.title: twilio-developer-kit
entry.content: Complete set of Twilio skills. Covers Setup, Planner, Product, and Guardrail skills across SMS, Voice, WhatsApp, AI agents, Conversation Orchestrator, and 30+ products.

entry.title: codey
entry.content: Live legibility for Claude Code: narrates what Claude is doing and warns when it's stuck.

entry.title: dynamic-workshop
entry.content: Interactive Claude Code workshop plugin — two modes: /workshop guide (moderator co-pilot) and /workshop learn (self-paced tutor). 17 modules (5+5+7) across 3 blocks covering foundations, ecosystem, and advanced topics.

entry.title: chili-piper-skills
entry.content: Official Chili Piper Skills for the Chili Piper MCP — meeting diagnostics, routing audits, no-show analysis, availability checks, and user onboarding/offboarding.

entry.title: claude-code-statusline
entry.content: CJK Windows UTF-8 safe real-time status bar showing context usage, session cost, time, and DeepSeek balance. Built to survive GBK/UTF-8 encoding conflicts on Chinese/Japanese/Korean Windows.

entry.title: claude-code-statusline
entry.content: Multi-provider statusline for Claude Code — DeepSeek ¥ tracking, opencode go subscription usage, Anthropic context bar. TrueColor gradient, git porcelain, code churn.

entry.title: taskyou
entry.content: Install and manage TaskYou — a personal task management system with Kanban board, background AI execution, and git worktree isolation.

entry.title: forge
entry.content: Unified AI coding workflow framework - single /forge slash command with 38 internal subcommands, TDD, spec-driven planning, and automated review.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Shihyu's curated collection of agent skills — install once, get them all

entry.title: claude-skills
entry.content: A collection of reusable Claude skills by Joe Stump.

entry.title: spark
entry.content: Spark repository development skills

entry.title: kagura-memory
entry.content: Kagura Memory Cloud plugin — session management, memory recall/save, and setup tools

entry.title: healer
entry.content: Universal Development Lifecycle Engine — 44 commands, 27 flow presets, Karpathy enforcement (P2 Simplicity + P3 Surgical HARD-GATEs), Deep-Research + Options-First Protocol (8-category research matrix, max-choice candidate counts, HTML gallery for UI picks), postfix `?` and `--help` discoverability, self-validating command catalog with auto-rebuild hook, 10x imitate (5-layer reverse-engineering with 4-in-1 output + Style DNA YAML) & flow testing, /healer:adapt replicator consuming Style DNA deterministically (PC/VM/CH/IC/BR/CV/AR/MD deep-style capture), design intelligence with 161 palettes, 57 fonts, and 99 UX guidelines.

entry.title: trinity-vsa-framework
entry.content: Trinity VSA/FPGA development framework with custom skills, hooks, and MCP integration for ternary computing

entry.title: maos
entry.content: MAOS (Multi-Agent OS) - Coordination Framework for AI Agents with Orchestration, Sentinel Protocol, Worktree Governance, Status Maps, Forge Meta-Agent, Governance Protocols

entry.title: open-agent-hub
entry.content: Unified capability management center for Skills, Agents, and Commands.

entry.title: elements-of-style
entry.content: Writing guidance based on William Strunk Jr.'s The Elements of Style (1918)

entry.title: draft
entry.content: Connects a Claude Code session to a Foundry/Draft workspace — surfaces the agent queue and runs the ticket-working loop.

entry.title: ot
entry.content: AI-executed skills for logged-in site access (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Reddit, Airbnb, Otter, and more), travel and award search, editorial review, and source-cited research.

entry.title: maia-skill
entry.content: Finance.ia — Multi-agent investment analysis system for market research, portfolio recommendations, and interactive reporting across crypto, stocks, forex, and commodities.

entry.title: fusebase-flow
entry.content: The framework client-facing teams use to build internal and client apps with AI. Two agents (Product Owner + AI Developer) run a disciplined spec-to-deploy lifecycle, packaged with FuseBase Apps domain skills. Closes the gaps that break real AI app development: drift, context rot, scope creep, unreliable hand-offs.

entry.title: mcpserver-grok
entry.content: Connect Grok CLI/TUI agents to McpServer for TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG, and workspace continuity.

entry.title: dark-factory
entry.content: Commands for writing, auditing, and managing dark-factory specs, prompts, and scenarios

entry.title: dolt-mcp-vcs
entry.content: Dolt/DoltHub version-control toolkit for Claude Code, via the dolthub/dolt-mcp server. A version-control-surface skill + expert agents over a Dolt backend — diagnosing DoltHub visibility, taming server sprawl, auditing the graph, and recovering incidents — with a verb-class mutation gate that keeps destructive ops (push/merge/reset/branch-delete) recommend-only. Ships the beads (bd) task-tracker as use-case adapter #1 today; evolving to a dialect-invariant core with thin flavor adapters (Dolt/Doltgres/DoltLite/DumboDB). Formerly `beads-dolt`.

entry.title: coppermind-cmo
entry.content: AI memory layer for fractional CMOs. Remembers every client detail across conversations.

entry.title: dq-toolkit
entry.content: Local code + documentation search — one SQLite store (code.db) over your repos and library docs, queried by Claude through the dq-sql CLI (SQLite FTS5 with porter stemming)

entry.title: mantle
entry.content: Core Mantle SDK skills for generated sites, marketplace capabilities, theming, updates, and production handoff.

entry.title: house-rules
entry.content: A lean brainstorm-plan-build loop for Claude Code, with a bundled terse persona and human-facing HTML docs.

entry.title: seo-aeo
entry.content: Make any site rank in Google AND get cited by AI answer engines, then auto-publish an optimized article every 1-2 weeks. Orchestrator skill /seo-aeo plus 7 gated task skills (discover, measure, on-site fix, build blog, engine, verify).

entry.title: chhsich-skills
entry.content: Orchestration skills for Claude Code + ECC + superpowers: subagent invocation, parallel issue execution, bug-fix discipline, and git discipline with an auto-installed PreToolUse hook.

entry.title: sentimeter
entry.content: Ask the SentiMeter agent about app ratings, reviews, and user-sentiment trends (Stori, Klar, Nubank, DiDi finanzas) from inside Claude Code, via the sentimeter CLI.

entry.title: consulting-os
entry.content: Skills for running an AI consulting practice operating system.

entry.title: get-offers
entry.content: Create reviewable resume, job, internship, mentor outreach, and research application campaigns.

entry.title: gen-meta-skills
entry.content: Personal skills marketplace for Claude Code — project structure guides, development workflows, and meta-skills

entry.title: dapei-skill
entry.content: Meta plugin for the dapei-skill marketplace. Installs the router skill plus all dapei-* skills.

entry.title: bifrost-plugin
entry.content: Bifrost MCP gateway plugin for Claude Code: memory auto-injection, skill discovery, one-command onboarding.

entry.title: keyhole
entry.content: Hand a secret to your AI coding agent through a localhost form — the value reaches a store by reference and never enters the chat context

entry.title: bps-compliance
entry.content: Building Performance Standards compliance — Local Law 97 NYC penalty calculator, BEPS ordinance tracking, compliance deadline alerts, and fine mitigation strategies across US/Canada/EU jurisdictions.

entry.title: filip-skills
entry.content: Agentic software engineering skills for grilling plans, domain modeling, and writing effective reusable skills.

entry.title: ask
entry.content: Agent-to-human request inbox. A single-binary inbox designed for AI coding agents to file requests for actions only a human can take — set up an OAuth credential, sign into a service, click around a feature and provide feedback, copy a file to a path the agent can't reach. Items live as plain JSON files in .ask/ inside any project. No server, no database, no schema setup.

entry.title: ollama-cloud-usage
entry.content: Show Ollama Cloud 5-hour and weekly quota usage in the Claude Code statusline. Mirrors the pi-ollama-usage extension for the pi coding agent. Zero-config reuses pi-ollama-usage session cookie when present.

entry.title: bob
entry.content: Delegate a build task to bob — an autonomous build→verify→judge loop that drives opencode + abe in an isolated worktree, gated on your tests. Exposes a `build` MCP tool, /bob:build, and a delegation skill.

entry.title: nethook
entry.content: A NetHack-style ASCII fishing roguelike to play in a second terminal window while Claude Code is busy. /gofish opens it; a hook pings you when Claude is done. Generate playable real-world fishing spots with /nethook:spot.

entry.title: exa
entry.content: Exa AI web search, deep research, and content extraction. Provides MCP tools and research skills for comprehensive web search, people discovery, company research, academic papers, and more.

entry.title: team-memory
entry.content: File-based project memory for Claude Code: durable knowledge with verification anchors, loaded at session start and recalled on demand. Includes /save, /recall, /memory-sweep and the SessionStart hooks that wire it together.

entry.title: claude-intercom
entry.content: Message-passing between independent Claude Code sessions running in WezTerm panes, addressed by role. One agent can hand work to another (e.g. a frontend session tells the backend session to expose an API) and the peer acts on it.

entry.title: amplemarket
entry.content: Sales and GTM skills for prospecting, account research, pipeline review, coaching, deliverability, and outreach. Requires the Amplemarket MCP server or connector.

entry.title: mumei
entry.content: Quality Enforcement Layer for Claude Code — Hook-gated SDD (spec & plan vehicles), Wave commits, and grounded multi-agent code review.

entry.title: ruflo-observability
entry.content: Structured logging, distributed tracing, and metrics — correlate agent swarm activity with application telemetry

entry.title: power-automate
entry.content: Edit and manage Power Automate cloud flows live from GitHub Copilot and Claude Code using the pa-flow MCP server.

entry.title: claudepress
entry.content: Universal WordPress/WooCommerce starter kit: a premium art-directed design system (Terra default + 6 directions), interactive setup skill, security-first hooks, a frontend-design commit skill, a Playwright design-review hard-fail gate and Opus 4.8 agents.

entry.title: humanizer
entry.content: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text, making it sound more natural and human. Based on Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing" guide.

entry.title: lw
entry.content: Lakin Wecker's personal skill suite. Skills are invoked under the lw: namespace (e.g. lw:communicator).

entry.title: tetsu-skills
entry.content: A collection of Claude Code skills by tetsuro.

entry.title: cc-messagebus
entry.content: Cross-session message bus for Claude Code with central observability

entry.title: loadtest-toolkit
entry.content: Generate k6 load-test scripts from a cURL command and turn k6 JSON summaries into HTML reports.

entry.title: plan-review
entry.content: Reviews an AI-generated implementation plan before execution: detects missing/out-of-order steps, nonexistent libraries, irreversible operations, ambiguous instructions, and stack mismatches, then issues a pass/fail verdict.

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Foundation-first autonomous build workflow for Claude Code: spec the foundation, build feature-by-feature, gate every milestone with independent verification and a commit-pinned record. Stack-neutral — each project derives its own verification profile.

entry.title: slides
entry.content: Turn .md, .txt, or code files into trustworthy reveal.js slide presentations via a deterministic knowledge graph + judge agent workflow.

entry.title: subtext
entry.content: Tools for agents to build with Subtext

entry.title: coding-crew
entry.content: A greeting plugin to learn the basics

entry.title: biotope
entry.content: Croissant-driven knowledge-graph construction (BioCypher ecosystem).

entry.title: lazyspec
entry.content: Spec-driven documentation workflow for Claude Code: lazyspec verb skills plus a convention-preamble hook that injects the project convention on every prompt.

entry.title: switchboard
entry.content: A local mailbox for deliberate agent coordination

entry.title: interaction-layer
entry.content: Voice awareness sidecar that narrates and converses about your Claude Code session in real time

entry.title: markdown-commenter
entry.content: Open a markdown file in a Google-Docs-style comment editor and let Claude address your comments. Wraps the `mdc` CLI.

entry.title: pipeline-skills
entry.content: AI skills for AIPCC pipeline failure analysis — error grouping and root cause analysis

entry.title: sentinel
entry.content: Self-hosted supply-chain posture loop: interactive scan, Claude triage, and an overnight digest.

entry.title: makerskills
entry.content: Corey Haines's personal maker skills — day-to-day work for a craft-forward founder running multiple products

entry.title: rubber-duck
entry.content: rubber-duck — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: annotron
entry.content: Review agent-generated HTML artifacts: annotate elements/text, send feedback, live-reload, finalize into the file, download.

entry.title: glueops
entry.content: Reusable GlueOps Agent Skills — release automation (release-please) and dependency-update consolidation. Skills load namespaced as /glueops:<skill>.

entry.title: clawdcursor
entry.content: Safe cross-OS desktop & browser control for Claude Code — the fallback execution layer for when APIs, CLIs, and direct integrations aren't available. Registers the clawdcursor MCP server in compact mode and bundles its usage skill (the SKILL.md at the repo root). Requires Node.js 20+; the MCP server launches via npx, which fetches clawdcursor on demand (or uses your global install if present) — no separate install step.

entry.title: chuzom
entry.content: Smart LLM routing with Claude subscription monitoring, complexity-first model selection, and 20+ AI providers

entry.title: ai-skills
entry.content: Benjamin's collection of Claude Code skills — daily workflow, code quality, dev tools, and specialist agents.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: builder-skills
entry.content: Public Builder skills for docs-first discipline, autonomous execution, cross-agent review, efficient agent workflows, clear status recaps, and Agent-Native Plan modes.

entry.title: bc-datahub
entry.content: Designs and operates Boomi DataHub master data — model and source design, deployment lifecycle, quarantine triage, and golden-record CRUD — when the user works with Boomi DataHub (MDM) configuration or stewardship. Pairs nicely with the boomi-integration skill.

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: testery
entry.content: Drive the Testery test orchestration platform from Claude Code: create runs, monitor, schedule, manage environments, and scaffold playwright-bdd projects.

entry.title: ai-founder-kb
entry.content: Queryable knowledge base of AI startup founder learnings, frameworks, and podcast transcripts. ~400 curated insights from 150+ founders + 1,600+ raw transcripts (Sequoia, 20VC, Dwarkesh, Acquired, Latent Space, Cheeky Pint, Cognitive Revolution, Lenny's).

entry.title: gitguardian
entry.content: The official GitGuardian plugin for AI coding agents. Detect hardcoded secrets, plant honeytokens, and triage incidents using ggshield, the GitGuardian Developer MCP server, and the GitGuardian API.

entry.title: lumin-repo-lens-lab
entry.content: Lumin Repo Lens Lab: repo structure lens for isolated performance and Rust sidecar experiments.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: discussion-tree
entry.content: Turn a single Claude Code session into a structured, parallel decision tree — answer discussion items independently in a browser mind-map and have the answers flow back over the MCP channel.

entry.title: falsegreen-skill
entry.content: LLM-based semantic analysis for false-positive test detection. Applies the J1-J6 judgment framework across Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Robot Framework, plus semantic patterns no static tool can see.

entry.title: aimi-engineering
entry.content: Autonomous task execution with standalone aimi-native agents. Direct tasks.json generation, research-driven planning, multi-agent review, iterative execution.

entry.title: gemini-manager
entry.content: Enables Claude Code to manage Gemini CLI as an intern. Claude acts as manager/architect while Gemini does all coding work.

entry.title: npalladium-skills
entry.content: Personal skills collection

entry.title: port-daddy
entry.content: Authoritative port management and multi-agent coordination for local development. Atomic port assignment, pub/sub messaging, distributed locks, and agent registry via CLI, SDK, or HTTP API.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: carol
entry.content: CAROL — Cognitive Amplifier Role Orchestration with LLM agents. Opinionated ritualistic framework that enforces discipline when working with multiple agents.

entry.title: hunter
entry.content: Find and verify professional email addresses, search contacts by domain, and enrich company data -- directly in Claude.

entry.title: armorclaude
entry.content: ArmorIQ intent-based security enforcement for Claude Code: policy-based tool access control, intent verification, CSRG cryptographic proofs, and audit logging.

entry.title: claude-skills-templates
entry.content: Work lifecycle pipeline, doc contract enforcement, and skill authoring workbench for Claude Code

entry.title: better-notion-mcp
entry.content: Markdown-first Notion API integration — 8 composite tools, ~95% coverage

entry.title: snapshot
entry.content: Session snapshot capture and restore system for Claude Code sessions. Captures terminal state, git context, test results, pending questions, and recent errors to enable seamless context restoration across compactions and multi-terminal workflows.

entry.title: finplan
entry.content: Personal finance projection engine — Monte Carlo projections, tax calculations, retirement planning, Social Security analysis, and interactive dashboards. Powered by 60+ MCP tools.

entry.title: breeze
entry.content: Breeze AI — functional graph, code graph, and design analysis skills

entry.title: hotl
entry.content: Human-on-the-Loop operating model: skills, workflows, and adapters for AI-native development

entry.title: slidev-theme-ustc
entry.content: Claude Code skill for the slidev-theme-ustc academic presentation theme

entry.title: atlassian
entry.content: Connect to Atlassian products including Jira and Confluence. Search and create issues, access documentation, manage sprints, and integrate your development workflow with Atlassian's collaboration tools.

entry.title: vulcan
entry.content: Agent-first CLI for trading perpetual futures on Phoenix DEX (Solana). Paper trading and read-only market data work out of the box; live trading opt-in via wallet password + dangerous-mode flag.

entry.title: seo-superpower
entry.content: End-to-end SEO + Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for technical builders. One command (/seo) drives the whole flow: bootstrap, audit, find underserved keywords, refresh stale content. Works on free-tier GSC + PageSpeed only — no DataForSEO, no $200/mo SaaS.

entry.title: mind
entry.content: Claude Mind - Give Claude photographic memory in ONE portable file. Share, version, and transfer your Claude's brain.

entry.title: building-flutter-apps
entry.content: Flutter app architecture skill: Riverpod 3 codegen, Freezed 3 sealed, GoRouter typed-route SSOT, Hive CE persistence, Crashlytics, gen-l10n. Pairs with the external flutter_skill_lints analyzer plugin (wired via analysis_options.yaml) for AST-level enforcement. Bundles PostToolUse, Stop, and UserPromptSubmit hooks that auto-fire only inside Flutter projects.

entry.title: claude-toolkit
entry.content: Commands, agents, scripts, and hooks for Claude Code development workflows

entry.title: swarm
entry.content: Launch agent teams for any kind of work — coding, writing, diagnosis, and more

entry.title: cc-skills-sdlc
entry.content: SDLC skills for Claude Code — architecture, planning, code quality, testing, review, and documentation.

entry.title: sf-demo-scout
entry.content: Salesforce demo preparation pipeline — sparring, audit, deployment for SE demo orgs

entry.title: outsystems
entry.content: Edit, publish, deploy, and search OutSystems apps from your AI assistant.

entry.title: moonshot-relay-claude-profile
entry.content: moonshot-relay-claude-profile — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: nature-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entry.title: claude-kit
entry.content: Multi-agent /workflow development pipeline (planner → plan-review → coder → code-review) with typed handoff contracts, lifecycle hooks, and MCP servers.

entry.title: slack
entry.content: Slack integration for searching messages, sending communications, managing canvases, and more

entry.title: agent-workflow-audit
entry.content: Stress-test a repo's agent-facing workflow and report issues

entry.title: nlpm
entry.content: Natural-Language Programming Manager — score, check, fix, and test NL artifacts across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Antigravity. Tier-aware scoring with per-tool overlays.

entry.title: numeric-mcp-toolkit
entry.content: AI skills for the Numeric MCP — close pulse, close retro, close checklist diagnostic, flux drafting, accruals, journal entries, rec workbooks, rec-assignment imports, department anomaly scanning, cross-workspace dashboards, audit evidence exports, consolidated flux, financial metrics, clean report exports, executive reports, AR/AP aging, and more.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,658 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: vd
entry.content: A daily-driver collection of skills for agentic coding, namespaced under `vd:` to avoid conflicts with other plugins.

entry.title: fizzy
entry.content: Fizzy integration for Claude Code. Manage boards, cards, track work, and link code to projects.

entry.title: wordpress-marketing-skills
entry.content: On-brand WordPress marketing writing skills for AI agents: WordPress.org/news posts, WordCamp event recaps, per-platform social copy, and WordPress Showcase site descriptions in the WordPress project voice.

entry.title: nx-plugin-for-aws
entry.content: Scaffold and build cloud-native applications on AWS using @aws/nx-plugin generators. Covers workspace creation, project scaffolding with TypeScript, Python, React, CDK, Terraform, and more.

entry.title: gitbook
entry.content: Comprehensive skill for GitBook documentation — create, manage, and author GitBook sites end-to-end via the GitBook REST API and Git Sync.

entry.title: openclaw-docs
entry.content: Authoritative, daily-refreshed OpenClaw documentation lookup. Bundles a Claude skill (with local lookup CLI + flattened markdown indexes) and a hosted MCP server (vector + trigram search, structural field-check, section extraction, version listing). Use to ground OpenClaw factual claims and prevent hallucinated config fields.

entry.title: claude-apd
entry.content: Agent Pipeline Development — enforced multi-agent pipelines with mechanical guardrails

entry.title: awow
entry.content: Set up or extend awow in any repo, new or existing. /awowify adds the files Claude Code or GitHub Copilot need to follow your issue board (Linear, Jira, GitHub Issues, Azure DevOps) and conventions — without overwriting what's already there — then walks you through configuring it.

entry.title: punchcard
entry.content: Drive AI coding agents through a punchcard board: a PM files tasks, an Engineer ships them as reviewed PRs with proof of work.

entry.title: azure-cosmosdb
entry.content: Official Claude plugin for Azure Cosmos DB (NoSQL). Bundles skills for data modeling, partition key design, query optimization, SDK best practices, indexing, vector search, full-text search, global distribution, security, and more.

entry.title: brag
entry.content: Turn the current project into a short, polished, shareable launch video using HyperFrames.

entry.title: sherpa
entry.content: Develop like a sherpa: composable /spec, /plan, and /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with bundled scout/review/build subagents and adversarial pressure at every boundary. The user composes the workflow; sherpa offers the tools. Nothing runs unasked, nothing persists unless you call /persist. Project-agnostic; extend with project packs.

entry.title: openaca
entry.content: Claude Code workflows for scanning agent supply-chain components with OpenACA.

entry.title: dev-loop
entry.content: A multi-agent software delivery loop coordinated through ticket state. PM, QA, Dev, Sweep, Reflect, Ops, Architect, and Communication cover product discovery, testing, implementation, hygiene, retrospectives, production watch, technical-health audits, and public article drafts. The optional senior/junior Dev split lets a stronger model design while a cheaper model implements. Coordination can run on Linear, a local file board, or the service hub with per-agent identity, a localhost web UI, documents, Lark/Slack channel, one-way Linear mirror, Codex/opencode portability, and a built-in scheduler that shells out to Claude or Codex without relying on /loop.

entry.title: radical-pipelines
entry.content: An agent orchestrator that runs teams of agents autonomously through a pipeline of defined phases, where each phase produces concrete, inspectable artifacts.

entry.title: axhub
entry.content: Korean-first Claude Code plugin for axhub. onboarding/init/deploy/import/development/diagnosis/clarity/update 8개 스킬이 ax-hub-cli v0.20.0+ 표면(hidden plugin-support 그룹 + 공개 deploy verify·diagnose·update)을 직접 호출해요. import 는 기존 로컬 앱 가져오기를, diagnosis 는 배포 실패 원인 요약을 담당하고, preview-confirm 배포와 verify 기반 성공 선언을 제공해요.

entry.title: crucible
entry.content: 52 agent skills for systematic software development. Covers design, planning, TDD, code review, debugging, quality gates, and adversarial testing. 12 core skills are eval-tested with measured A/B deltas using Anthropic's skill evaluation framework.

entry.title: citevahti
entry.content: CiteVahti — citation integrity for manuscripts. Human-first blinded claim verification with PubMed, decision-gated Zotero write-back, and a hash-chained audit trail; plus an AI-assisted drafting skill that writes only from verified claims.

entry.title: financial-analysis
entry.content: Core financial modeling and analysis tools: DCF, comps, LBO, 3-statement models, competitive analysis, and deck QC

entry.title: agenticloop
entry.content: Agentic Loop workflow toolkit: supervised orchestrator/maintainer/engineer roles plus markdown-first skills for planning, TDD, review, and closeout.

entry.title: xmemo
entry.content: Persistent, user-owned memory for AI agents over hosted MCP. Remember decisions, recall project context, manage TODOs, and govern memory lifecycle across sessions.

entry.title: togi
entry.content: Captures AI coding friction — corrections, clarifications, denied tool calls — in-session at no extra cost, and turns recurring doc gaps into context-doc pull requests.

entry.title: storyforge
entry.content: AI-powered book writing pipeline: brainstorm, concept, plot, characters, chapters, export

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: phovia
entry.content: Phovia memory hooks and local MCP search for Claude Code, with device login.

entry.title: marketing-img
entry.content: 도메인 중립 광고 이미지 소재 프롬프트 생성 시스템 — 브랜드/제품/페르소나는 설치처에서 설정. request-eval → interview → mode → 4 프롬프트 후보. 공개 광고 투명성 라이브러리(Meta Ad Library + Google Ads Transparency) 수집 기반. prompt-only(실 이미지 생성·프로바이더 호출 없음).

entry.title: persona-lab
entry.content: A multi-persona operating model for single-human-driven autonomous SDLC.

entry.title: yana-ai
entry.content: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entry.title: effort-gate
entry.content: Universal EFFORT standing-order for Claude Code. Injects a full effort doctrine at SessionStart and re-asserts it every turn so the agent works each task to done-and-proven — refusing unnatural, slop, mean-reverting premature exits. In-generation governance, caveman-pattern, no post-turn detection.

entry.title: odoo-ai-skills
entry.content: The local-first verification & deploy gate for AI-written Odoo 17/18/19 changes — static indexes suggest; this verifies against the running instance. Read ground truth from the live instance first (fields, MRO/super chains, views, security, runtime flow, runtime state + exception post-mortem, reverse field impact, effective per-user/company security, module load state), build the smallest correct change, prove it with tests, and review it before merge — never guess. Layer-K discovery solves the cold-start problem — rank the live entrypoint surface (buttons/crons/automations/routes), sample the real cross-app flow as an Execution Surface Graph, measure hallucination reduction against a benchmark, and ENFORCE no-introspect-no-edit via a PreToolUse hook. Layer-I enforcement gates turn that evidence into proof: risk-based scenario test generation, dev-vs-prod environment parity, a static anti-pattern validator, enforced privacy redaction, an upgrade/migration harness, a deploy approval gate, a one-command evidence bundle (PR-comment verdict), and a bring-your-own-index claim verifier; plus a local Odoo developer-docs index (Layer J). No SaaS, no seats, no metadata leaves the box. Covers models, scaffolding, views, OWL, public web (controllers/website/portal), security, reports, data, migration, performance, deploy (incl. odoo.sh), and domain playbooks.

entry.title: primereact-docs
entry.content: Local, daily-synced mirror of the PrimeReact v11 docs (components, theming/design tokens, PassThrough, hooks) plus a v10->v11 version guardrail, so Claude answers from real v11 docs instead of guessing.

entry.title: disconnected-readiness-scorer
entry.content: Score a repository's readiness for disconnected / air-gapped OpenShift deployments

entry.title: oats-skills
entry.content: Vue, Tauri, architecture, security, and MCP-debugging skills tailored to the oats desktop app.

entry.title: pfalkowski-skills
entry.content: Skills for Azure DevOps PR review, autonomous overnight backlog runs, dormant NuGet repo refresh, trading/ML signal verdicts, ordered prompt backlogs, stacked-PR merges, fresh-context handoff checks, self-evolving skills, and recurring self-improvement runs.

entry.title: quetzalcoatl
entry.content: Quetzalcoatl — Meaning-First AI Project OS. /Quetzalcoatl 한 번으로 의미검증→GarryTan Office Hours→3~5개 대안→Claude-GPT 교차검증→문서·대시보드→Ship→Retro 까지 운영하는 모델 중립형 스킬. v1.2.0: 지속 자율 실행·레이트리밋 회복력·문서 체계·Git 프로토콜·교차 에이전트/기기 핸드오프. v1.3.0: 앵커된 선호 처리(근거 게이트 override)·대안 비교 §4 승격. v1.4.0: 대시보드 HTML 미러·/dashboard 갱신(§7.2). v1.5.0: 강제 바인딩(규율→강제, 있을 때만)·증거기반 완료·capability matrix(외부 도구 역량). v1.6.0: /context 벤더-중립 휴대용 브리핑(§24).

entry.title: casomoltd
entry.content: Casomo shared engineering standards as a Claude Code plugin: skills (commit, release-version, frontend-design, python-style, typescript, screenshot, design-pass), PreToolUse guard hooks, and house-standards agents (code-review, design-xray)

entry.title: openquok
entry.content: Openquok CLI skill for the social media scheduling API — integrations, posts, uploads, analytics (JSON output for agents).

entry.title: zulgap
entry.content: 줄갭 팀원용 콘텐츠 작업 도구 — 시작(허브 현황 보기), 세션저널(작업 기록), 노션·PPT·한글 MCP
